summary: W865 keeps the target nonterminal under the immutable original four-task contract while composing W844 target-isomorphism direct-source data with the W864 stable-ExactAt route. From one W844 datum, W865 checks direct bounded left calculus through the W843/W864 concrete-leaves target ExactAt route and obtains the bounded derived infinity-category package through W843/W864. Product success remains false because concrete W844 fields, the final original-four-task witness, and the completion review packet are still incomplete.
known_gaps: Task 4 is not contract-complete under the original four-task contract: W865 replaces the W864 W843 target ExactAt payload boundary with W844 target-isomorphism direct-source data, but still requires concrete W844 fields.
Concrete W844 data still includes W735 closed-map or closed-embedding exact inputs and a W784 target-isomorphism realization payload; those fields are not yet fully instantiated.
The final Dbounded MetrizableLCA original four-task completion witness is still missing; ProductSuccessDeclarations and OriginalFourTaskCompletionDeclarations only record nonterminal route evidence.
The completion review packet still lacks the immutable-contract negative-fixture coverage, external SHA256 sidecar, and clean extraction audit required for product success.
remaining_work: Construct or precisely block concrete W844 target-isomorphism direct-source data, especially the W735 exact inputs or W784 target-isomorphism realization payload now isolated by W865.
Connect the resulting route to a no-argument or fully instance-resolved original four-task completion witness only after all route inputs are real.
Refresh the completion review packet, negative fixtures, manifest, clean extraction audit, and terminal outcome only after the original witness exists.
